rules.name: Soft Clause Prohibition
rules.description: LCs must not contain clauses making payment conditional on applicant approval or documents in applicant control
patterns: to the satisfaction of the applicant

rules.name: Presentation Period Minimum
rules.description: Presentation period must be at least 21 days after shipment as per UCP 600 Article 14(c)

rules.name: Ambiguous Document Description
rules.description: Document requirements must not use vague qualifiers

rules.name: Evergreen Clause
rules.description: Standby LCs must not contain automatic extension clauses beyond bank-approved limits

rules.name: Prohibited Country Restriction
rules.description: LC must not name countries under active OFAC/UN sanctions as loading or discharge ports

rules.name: Tolerance Clause Check
rules.description: Credit amount tolerances exceeding 10% require credit approval per UCP 600 Article 30
